project_identity.name: Sister Viviane's School - Hope for Madagascar
project_identity.mission_statement: Je fait grandir Madagascar par la qualité de mes actions
project_identity.design_archetype: Organic & Earthy (Archetype 1) with Vibrant Play (Archetype 6) elements

headings.usage: Main headlines, section titles. Use 'Soft' axis if available or standard bold.

usage_rules.text: Never pure black. Use neutral-900 (#282626) for headings, neutral-800 for body.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: The 'Bento' Grid Protocol - Mode A (Tetris) for Gallery and Mission.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise or paper grain overlay on the background (opacity 0.03) to create a 'tactile' feel.
visual_enhancers.decorations: Use SVG shapes (organic blobs) in secondary-100 or primary-100 behind images.
visual_enhancers.dividers: Torn paper edges or gentle wave SVGs between sections.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use 'Crystal Glass' for the sticky header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/20.

about_image.note: Use this as the 'About Sister Viviane' anchor image

media_assets.icons: lucide-react (Heart, BookOpen, GraduationCap, Coins, Phone, Facebook, Globe)

Header.styling: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/70 sticky top-0 z-50 border-b border-stone-100

Hero.layout: Background image with a floating 'frosted glass' card containing the main message.
Hero.content: Headline: 'Je fait grandir Madagascar par la qualité de mes actions'. Subhead: 'Soutenez l'école de Sœur Viviane.' CTA: 'Faire un don'.

DonationSection.style: High contrast. White card on Primary-50 background.
DonationSection.highlight: Make the 'TapTap Send' option prominent as it is preferred for diaspora.

ContactBar.style: Fixed bottom-right WhatsApp button (Green) with 'Chat with Sister' tooltip.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: yarn add framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge @fontsource/fraunces @fontsource/manrope @fontsource/caveat
Setup Tailwind Colors: Extend theme with the 'Madagascar Earth' and 'Malagasy Forest' palettes provided.
Implement Smooth Scroll: Add 'scroll-smooth' to html tag.
Font Loading: Import fonts in main entry file.
Texture: Add a global background texture in index.css using a pseudo-element on body.
Accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratios (Red on White needs careful weight selection).
Animations: Use framer-motion for 'fade-up' effects on scroll for all sections. No 'transition: all'.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text.
Do NOT use standard 'alert' reds. Use the specified Earth Red.
Images must have 'rounded-2xl' and subtle parallax if possible.
